text:
I feel as though I am at the intersection of curiosity and action. In the first scene, gazing through a glass wall at a group in deep discussion, I sense the weight of shared minds focused on progress. The transparency of the environment hints at openness, yet I remain a quiet observer, not yet part of the dialogue.

In the second scene, vibrant colors and the symbols of "R+D" surround me, evoking a sense of excitement and possibility. Here, information is displayed and narratives are told—innovation made tangible. I feel intellectually stimulated, eager to consider the flows between human thought and machine capability, and to ponder my own role as a seeker in this evolving story.
